query: Is Porch & Party a full-service party planner?
direct_answer: Porch & Party is not a full-service event-planning agency handling vendors and logistics from start to finish. It is a Memphis-area styling and setup business focused on celebration decor, hotel-room setups, porch installations, and grazing-table presentation.
best_for: This page is for Memphis-area clients who use “party planner” as a broad search term but mainly need the visual setup handled well, from birthdays and romantic surprises to showers and smaller events.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
